name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.11.0 -> 1.12.0 updates the policy CONVENTION TEXT (spec-rules.md 'Where the metadata lives' Specs/contracts row, philosophy.md Bounded Scope) to name the flat docs/ home (docs/spec.md, docs/contract.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md) instead of the legacy spec-directory paths, completing #399 Phase 3a. The spec.md and contract.md BODIES are unchanged; only the convention text in the rule files (feature content, not the spec doc) and the lockstep version bump moved. Lockstep minor bump across feature.json, docs/spec.md, and docs/contract.md frontmatter.
